message: Node started: For the following six systems, identify their dimension n and diffusion order s, then calculate the De Giorgi exponent using the formula derived by the first helper: 1. 3D Navier-Stokes, 2. 2D Navier-Stokes, 3. 1D Burgers, 4. Surface Quasi-Geostrophic (SQG) equation, 5. Magnetohydrodynamics (MHD), 6. Fractional Navier-Stokes. List the (n, s) pair and the resulting exponent for each.
